entity.summary: Decentralized swap aggregator routing trades across multiple liquidity sources and current deployments on Berachain, HyperEVM, Botanix, and Monad through an on-chain router and public swap API.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation publishes live OBRouter deployments for Berachain, HyperEVM, Botanix, and Monad and documents the Swap API and executor flow used for day-to-day swaps. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Ooga Booga aggregator deployments
evidence.notes: First-party deployment documentation lists current OBRouter deployments on Berachain, HyperEVM, Botanix, and Monad.

evidence.title: Ooga Booga Swap API
evidence.notes: First-party developer documentation describes OBRouter, API-generated swap routes, OBExecutor execution, and the current public Swap API.
